query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "tide: proactive multi-problem discovery via template-guided iteration" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) by measuring the same core mechanism (security degradation via iterative LLM refinement) and the same dependent variable (vulnerability evolution) as the user's question, even though it focuses on the security domain rather than the specific "linguistics" aspect mentioned in the user's title. It provides the necessary empirical baseline and evidence regarding the "paradox" of iterative improvement that the user's follow-up research would need to cite.
